title: Fix Lobster workflow condition syntax
content: Fixed unsupported condition syntax in sync.lobster workflow. Changed from `when: "$rotate_buffer.json.has_content == false"` to `when: $rotate_buffer.json.should_exit` with corresponding script update. Lobster's `when:` clause expects simple boolean references, not comparison expressions. Updated rotate_buffer.py to include `should_exit` field (inverted `has_content`) in JSON output.
